"'''Ghosts of Hoth'''" is a ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' comic.

==Plot summary==
{{Quote|They killed us all|[[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] settler ghost girl warning [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] about the [[Wampa/Legends|Wampa]] colony near [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]].|<ref name="Comic">''Ghosts of Hoth''</ref>}}
[[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] is at work servicing the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon's'']] [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] at [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]], when the ghost of a young female child appears to him, gesturing for help. Chewbacca is frightened by the encounter, and locks himself aboard the ''Millennium Falcon''. Meanwhile, a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] sentry is attacked by a [[Wampa/Legends|wampa]] while on watch duty.

Back at Echo Base, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] is unable to convince Chewbacca to leave the ship until he is told who originally built the base. Han turns to a nearby Alliance member, who informs him that nobody knows who built the base, but it is generally thought that the settlers were driven away by the weather of [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. Despite being told this, Chewbacca refuses to open the ''Millennium Falcon'', and Han leaves in irritation.

Sometime later, the ghosts of the settlers, led by the spirit of the little girl, return to Chewbacca, and appeal for him to follow them. Chewbacca pushes through a wall of the base to reveal the lair of a wampa. Inside, the wampa is consuming the hapless rebel sentry, amid the remains of the settlers. When it charges him, Chewbacca shoots it with his [[Bowcaster/Legends|Bowcaster]]. He then retrieves a bracelet belonging to the little girl. With his nerves settled, Chewbacca returns to work on the ''Falcon'', and the spirits of the settlers materialize a final time, this time appearing less ghoulish.
